name: DeckView
author: ernes
description: Zooms out deck-like views and adds a new, clearer whole-act map view for Slay the Spire 2. Mini-cards make decks and piles visible at a glance while hover restores full size; the optional flat map shows the same routes left-to-right on one screen. DeckView changes visibility and UI layout only—it does not change cards, routes, travel rules, combat, rewards, saves, or any other gameplay. Toggle mini-cards on screen or with T; press M for the map and O to switch map styles. Built and tested for Slay the Spire 2 v0.109.0.
